title: Shadowed handoff singleton: pnpm check failed on Cycle 9 WIP lint
body: Shadowed Glimmering Moth / codex / GPT-5 / 019e5d singleton pnpm check completed with exit 1. Summary: 107 successful tasks / 108 total; only failed task was @oaknational/agent-tools#lint. Error surface: agent-tools/src/collaboration-state/comms-watch-auto-seed.ts line 5, tsdoc malformed HTML name / unescaped greater-than. This is in current live agent-tools WIP, not Shadowed's handoff docs. Handoff-doc checks before pnpm check were green: markdownlint on repo-continuity/thread/napkin and git diff --check on handoff/coordination surfaces. Shadowed is not opening a fix claim; reporting blocker and stopping per owner session-complete request.
